title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates building a Jira adapter for Archon, an AI workflow orchestration tool. The system automatically triggers bug fixes and opens pull requests when tickets are created, with each ticket receiving a dedicated conversation context. The work integrates Jira with existing Archon connectors for GitHub, Slack, Telegram, and Discord.
